meta.title: LemonSpace — Join the waitlist
meta.description: A visual workspace for creative teams. Brief, generate, compare, and export campaign-ready image variants. Early access waitlist.

hero.headline: Campaign-ready image variants, without the tool chaos.
hero.subheadline: LemonSpace is a visual workspace for small creative teams: brief, generate, compare, and export — your assets where you want them.
hero.privacyNote: No spam. We'll email you when the beta opens.

issue.label: The issue
issue.headline: Your image workflow lives in eight browser tabs.
issue.b1: Something needs your attention. Is it tab three? Tab five? You're clicking through all eight trying to find the one that's screaming. By the time you find it, another tool has already timed out.
issue.b2: You generated twelve variants but they're scattered across folders, chats, and downloads. Comparing them means opening six windows side by side and hoping you don't lose track.
issue.b3: Every prompt and asset lives on someone else's infrastructure. When confidentiality matters, parking brand assets in yet another SaaS is a tough sell.

fix.label: The fix
fix.headline: One canvas. Every variant. Full control.
fix.subheadline: LemonSpace keeps everything on a single visual board — upload, prompt, generate, compare, and export from one place. No more juggling tools, no more scattered files.

canvas.title: Visual Canvas
canvas.desc: Your image workflow lives on a node-based canvas. Brief images, connect prompts, see generations, compare results, and export — all on one board. Drag nodes, connect them, and see the whole flow at a glance.

prompt.title: Prompt Studio
prompt.desc: Stop writing prompts into a chat box. Prompt Studio gives you structured fields for brand, subject, style, format, and constraints. No more guessing what works — the brief builds the prompt for you.

compare.title: Comparison View
compare.desc: Line up variants side by side and pick the best one. See them all at once with confidence scores and star ratings. Flag the winner and send it straight to export — no screenshots scattered in a drive folder.

export.title: Export Queue
export.desc: Batch-export campaign-ready assets in multiple formats and sizes. Web, social, print — name your presets and export them all with one click. No more opening Photoshop six times.

library.title: Asset Library
library.desc: Upload and organize brand assets, reference images, and approved templates in one place. When someone on the team uploads a new reference, everyone sees it. No more scattered files in drive folders.

selfhosted.title: Self-Hosted
selfhosted.desc: Run LemonSpace on your own infrastructure. Your brand assets never leave your server. Full control over data, deployment, and compliance. Docker, Kubernetes, or bare metal — you decide.

how.label: How it Works
how.headline: From idea to campaign images in minutes

step1.title: Upload
step1.desc: Drop your brand assets and reference images onto the canvas.

step2.title: Connect
step2.desc: Build your workflow with nodes: add prompts, choose AI models, set parameters.

step3.title: Generate
step3.desc: Let AI create variants. Agents can batch-process hundreds of images.

step4.title: Export
step4.desc: Compare, select, and download your campaign-ready images.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.headline: Simple, credit-based pricing
pricing.subheadline: Pay only for what you use. Start free, scale as you grow.
pricing.info: 1 Credit ≈ 1 AI Image Generation · Top-up anytime

waitlist.success: You are on the list. Thank you.
waitlist.already: You already joined from this device.
waitlist.errorInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
waitlist.ctaSub: We're building LemonSpace for teams who ship campaign images at scale. Join the waitlist and be the first to know when we launch.

footer.tagline: Visual workspace for small creative teams. In active development.
footer.note: Self-hosted and source-available are on the roadmap — this is not a finished product pitch.
